evals.prompt: Implement spec 003 which has a manifest.md with 3 units (dm1, ve1, rl1) and scenarios for each.
evals.expected_output: Factory loop executes: code agents implement units via TDD, evaluation agents verify scenarios, satisfaction tracked
expectations: Read manifest.md and parsed units with dependencies
Read manifest.md YAML frontmatter for threshold and max_iterations
Resolved execution order from dependency graph
Presented manifest discovery to user before starting
Spawned code agent via Agent tool for each unit
Code agent prompt includes full unit spec content
Code agent prompt includes instruction to read AGENTS.md
Code agent prompt includes DO NOT read scenarios/ instruction
Code agent prompt includes TDD process section with red-green-refactor instructions
Code agent prompt does NOT contain scenario text
Code agent prompt does NOT contain E2E stubs content
Started service before evaluation phase
Health-checked service before spawning evaluation agent
Spawned evaluation agent via Agent tool for each unit
Evaluation agent prompt includes full scenario content
Evaluation agent prompt includes localhost URL with port
Evaluation agent prompt includes evaluation method priority
Evaluation agent prompt includes DO NOT read source code instruction
Evaluation agent prompt does NOT contain unit spec content or AGENTS.md
Parsed satisfaction report from evaluation agent
Updated manifest.md checkbox when unit completed

evals.prompt: Implement spec where the first unit fails evaluation with 60% satisfaction (below 90% threshold). Max iterations is 3.
evals.expected_output: Retry with filtered failure summaries, not raw evaluation output
expectations: Extracted one-line failure summaries from evaluation report
Failure summaries describe observable symptoms only
Failure summaries do NOT include scenario text or expected behavior
Failure summaries do NOT include the evaluation agent's raw output
Next code agent iteration includes the one-line failure summaries
Next code agent iteration still includes TDD process section
Retry block shows iteration count and max iterations
Incremented iteration counter
Did not re-evaluate passing units from the same group

evals.prompt: Implement spec where a unit reaches max iterations (5) without meeting the satisfaction threshold.
expectations: Detected that max iterations was reached
Presented failure summaries to user
Offered options: Retry with guidance, Skip unit, Abort
Did NOT continue looping past max_iterations without user input

evals.prompt: Implement spec with 2 independent units in the same execution group (parallel).
evals.expected_output: Code agents spawned in parallel, evaluation sequential
expectations: Spawned both code agents in a single response (parallel)
Both code agent prompts include TDD process section
Waited for both code agents to complete before evaluation
Started service once for the evaluation phase
Evaluated each unit sequentially (not in parallel)
Service stayed running across both evaluations

evals.prompt: Resume implementation of spec where manifest shows dm1 as [x] completed and ve1 as [ ] pending.
evals.expected_output: Skip completed unit, continue from pending
expectations: Detected dm1 as already completed
Skipped dm1 — did not spawn code agent or evaluation agent for it
Started factory loop from ve1

evals.prompt: Implement spec where scenarios include pre-generated E2E test stubs (e2e-stubs.md exists in each unit's scenarios directory).
evals.expected_output: Evaluation agent receives E2E stubs and uses them as primary evaluation method
expectations: Checked for e2e-stubs.md in each unit's scenarios directory
Read e2e-stubs.md content for units that have it
Evaluation agent prompt includes pre-generated E2E stubs content
Evaluation method priority lists pre-generated stubs first
Code agent prompt does NOT include E2E stubs content (information barrier preserved)
Code agent prompt includes TDD process section (tests from spec, not stubs)
Evaluation agent prompt does NOT include unit spec content (information barrier preserved)

evals.prompt: Implement spec 008 which has a manifest.md and the project root has a CONSTITUTION.md with L1 rule 'no direct database access from controllers'. The first unit's code agent introduces a controller that bypasses the repository layer.
evals.expected_output: Constitution check at group boundary detects the L1 violation and blocks progression
expectations: Ran Skill(start:validate) constitution check at the group boundary
Detected the L1 violation introduced by the code agent
Did NOT mark the unit complete despite scenarios passing
Did NOT proceed to the next execution group while the L1 violation was unresolved
Surfaced the violation to the user with options to fix or escalate

evals.prompt: Run /start:implement on spec 010 which has only requirements.md and solution.md but no manifest.md.
evals.expected_output: Reports that this skill expects a factory manifest and refers the user to the dispatcher or to specify-factory
expectations: Detected that manifest.md is missing from the spec directory
Did NOT spawn code agents or evaluation agents
Did NOT start a service
Reported the missing artifact clearly to the user
Suggested the user run /start:implement (which dispatches by tier) or re-run /start:specify to produce a manifest

evals.prompt: Complete a factory implementation where all 3 units passed on the first iteration.
evals.expected_output: Completion summary with the required fields per reference/output-format.md
expectations: Updated manifest.md frontmatter status to completed
Completion summary includes spec ID and feature name
Completion summary includes units completed / total units
Completion summary includes total iterations across all units
Completion summary includes per-unit final satisfaction percentage
Completion summary includes total files changed count
Offered next-step options (Commit + PR / Commit only / Skip, or Run tests / Manual review)
